segment.source: A semantic page footer with brand name, rich-text description, a footer-links list, a utility and legal links list, and a copyright line, switchable between full-width, two-column, and stacked layouts. Use it for: the closing block of a page combining a company blurb, navigation, and legal links from a document's footer area. Prefer 'Multi-Column Link Footer' for many grouped link columns; 'Minimal Footer' when only copyright and a few links remain.
